Here is the extracted information in JSON format:

```json
{
  "username": "techguru42",
  "joined_year": 2020,
  "followers": "1.2K",
  "following": 890,
  "posts": 342,
  "verified": true,
  "bio": "Building the future of AI"
}
```

Note that I've kept the "followers" value as a string, as it appears to be a string representation of a number (1.2K). If you'd like to convert it to an integer, you can do so by replacing the "K" with a 1000 multiplier, like this:

```json
{
  "username": "techguru42",
  "joined_year": 2020,
  "followers": 1200,
  "following": 890,
  "posts": 342,
  "verified": true,
  "bio": "Building the future of AI"
}
```
